div.head: The Ambassador in China (Stuart) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Nanking, June 24, 1949—5 p. m.
[Received June 24—10:27 a. m.]

div.p: 1371. I have had word indirectly from Chen Ming-shu that he has already had conversations with Mao Tse-tungChairman of the Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party. and Chou En-lai which he regards as completely satisfactory. He reports that he will hasten his return to Shanghai via Nanking and expresses hope that I will delay my departure for US accordingly (see Embtel 1322, June 18). Further comment will be made after I have heard directly from Chen but I consider it significant that he saw these two top Communist leaders so promptly and advanced date return south with their approval.
